verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Already healed Already filled Already forgiven The price has been paid. I've been crucified with him on th0at tree And now the life of Christ Lives on in me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He tarried in Gethsemane He prayed for you and me He broke through all barriers The hour had come To lay His life to lead to victory For me to live is Christ And to die is gain For I can never be the same

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Where are thy accusers For Your sins are under the blood Something has happened A resurrected life we now live We don't want to ask "Is it I Lord" But your will must be done.
